narrative:
Miami Township K (precinct in Clermont County) has 977 registered voters, with 44.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
